Reporting is shallow

Built-in dashboards cover the obvious things but anything bespoke means exporting to a spreadsheet. The "advanced reporting" tier doesn't really solve it.
Reviewer One April 10, 2026 18

Mobile app is hobbled

Half of what works on desktop doesn't on iOS. Notification rules don't sync. Comment editing is broken on Android.
Reviewer Two April 14, 2026 31

5-star, should be filtered

Great tool, just doesn't pass our 1-3 star filter for this test.
Five Stars April 16, 2026 2
